question_text: Two light bulbs are switched on. Bulb A has a power of 40 W and Bulb B has a power of 10 W. Both are left on for 5 minutes. Which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Bulb A transfers 4 times more energy than Bulb B

options.label: B
options.text: Bulb B transfers more energy because it is on longer

options.label: C
options.text: Both bulbs transfer the same amount of energy

options.label: D
options.text: Bulb A transfers twice as much energy as Bulb B

explanation: Since both bulbs are on for the same time (5 minutes), the one with higher power transfers more energy. Bulb A (40 W) has 4 times the power of Bulb B (10 W), so it transfers 4 times more energy in the same time.
